_meta.description: Sell-side analyst valuation methodologies for US Bitcoin mining companies
_meta.note: Bank names canonicalized (HC Wainwright -> H.C. Wainwright, Roth MKM -> Roth Capital, Northland Capital Markets -> Northland, etc). Dedup by (ticker, bank, date). Methodology only set when source explicitly states it.

coverage.key_assumptions: 10x 2027E EV/EBITDA multiple; long-term BTC price assumption $100k; ~27,000 BTC reserve forecast; ~50 EH/s capacity goal requiring ~$377M additional ASIC spending out of $2B ATM program
coverage.note: Initiation of coverage; argues ABTC is one of last 'pure-play' levered BTC exposure plays; 106% upside

coverage.key_assumptions: Same framework as initiation; 10x 2027E EV/EBITDA
coverage.note: Upgrade reported one day after initiation per third-party tracker (likely same call reclassified)
HC Wainwright initiated coverage with Buy recommendation
Reiterated Buy with $4 PT; subsequently cut PT in August 2024

coverage.key_assumptions: Bitcoin halving impact and revenue declines cited
coverage.note: PT cut from $4 to $3; Buy maintained

coverage.key_assumptions: Cathedra merger and capacity expansion cited
coverage.note: Reaffirmed Buy with $3 PT post-Cathedra merger commentary

coverage.key_assumptions: FY2025 EPS estimate cut to ($0.46) from ($0.44)
coverage.note: EPS estimate revision; PT held at $3
AI pivot accelerating; $160M facility secures growth runway
PT raised to $40 from $30 post hyperscaler lease.

coverage.key_assumptions: Joe Flynn covers APLD at Compass Point; specific PT and methodology not retrieved.
coverage.note: Compass Point's Joe Flynn covers APLD among miners/HPC names.

coverage.key_assumptions: Methodology not explicitly disclosed in summary; Northland generally uses HPC/AI infrastructure framework with hyperscaler lease economics.
Methodology not disclosed.

coverage.note: Raised PT to $48 from $41 on hyperscaler win execution.
Post-halving margin pressure; international expansion is longer-term catalyst

coverage.key_assumptions: Methodology not explicitly disclosed.
H.C. Wainwright uses EV/revenue multiple framework + BTC market value. Cited that BITF trades at $1.4M per 2027 MW vs ~$5M/MW for HPC peers.
coverage.note: H.C. Wainwright PT raised from $4 to $5.50 on HPC/AI potential; later reduced.
PT cut to $4 from $5.50 on AI rotation.

coverage.key_assumptions: Same EV/revenue framework + BTC value; PT cut from $4 to $3.70 on valuation.
coverage.note: H.C. Wainwright maintained Buy with reduced PT.

coverage.key_assumptions: B. Riley uses low/mid-double-digit EV/EBITDA multiples for digital asset miners.
coverage.note: B. Riley set $5 PT on BTBT.

coverage.key_assumptions: EV/revenue + BTC + HPC framework typical for H.C. Wainwright miner coverage.
coverage.note: H.C. Wainwright high target $7 on BTBT.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $16 to $29; methodology not explicitly disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Benchmark's Mark Palmer raised BTDR PT to $29.

coverage.key_assumptions: Roth SOTP/NPV framework typical; specific Bitdeer multiples not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Roth high target on BTDR at $40.

coverage.key_assumptions: Cantor likely uses sum-of-segments approach (mining + ASIC sales + HPC) but specific methodology not disclosed in summary.

coverage.note: Attractive valuation; Texas expansion positions Cipher for growth

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $8 to $16; methodology not explicitly stated.
coverage.note: Macquarie doubled CIFR PT to $16 maintaining Outperform.

coverage.key_assumptions: Blended valuation: 60% weight EV/Hashrate, 15% 2025 EV/Sales, 10% 2025 EV/EBITDA. Long-term hosting agreements with Fluidstack and AWS support 12-month bull case to $26.
coverage.note: Cantor uses an explicit weighted multi-multiple blend (60/15/10) rather than pure SOTP.

coverage.key_assumptions: Cited AWS lease at 300MW Black Pearl site as catalyst; PT raised from $14.50 to $27.50. Specific multiples not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Northland highlighted AWS lease economics; methodology not fully disclosed.

coverage.key_assumptions: Upgraded as part of higher-conviction phase post-AWS/Fluidstack deals; 4-yr gross profit + power asset + HODL premium framework.
coverage.note: JPMorgan upgraded CIFR alongside CLSK in 2026 sector reset.
Strong FY2024 results; one of the most efficient miners in the sector
Raising target; CleanSpark's rapid hash rate expansion and cost efficiency are impressive
Cantor raises PT to $24 on higher BTC.

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP combines BTC holdings + mining EBITDA + AI co-lo/cloud + $3M/MW for power sites
coverage.note: Bernstein hikes CLSK from $20 to $24 in SOTP framework.

coverage.key_assumptions: 7.5x EV/revenue multiple applied to fiscal 2026 revenue estimate (down from prior 10x), plus market value per share of company's bitcoin holdings.
coverage.note: H.C. Wainwright cut PT from prior level to $27 with 7.5x EV/revenue and explicit BTC HODL add-on.

coverage.key_assumptions: Four-year gross profit + land/power asset value + HODL premium framework; CLSK upgraded to Overweight in early 2026 reset.
coverage.note: JPMorgan reiterated $14 target while upgrading to Overweight.

coverage.key_assumptions: Maintained 7.5x EV/revenue multiple framework on fiscal 2026 revenue + BTC market value per share; PT cut to $22 on BTC bear market.
coverage.note: Same EV/revenue + BTC stack methodology; PT lowered on BTC weakness.
CoreWeave deal is transformational; upgrading target significantly
AI pivot with CoreWeave deal significantly improves long-term revenue visibility

coverage.key_assumptions: Upgraded to Buy from Neutral on HPC momentum; specific PT and methodology not in public summary.
coverage.note: B. Riley upgraded CORZ to Buy citing HPC momentum.

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP: standalone leasing of power pipeline for HPC; CoreWeave lease NPV + ~700MW uncontracted at recent $/MW M&A comps
coverage.note: Roth upgrade as CoreWeave merger less likely; SOTP at $23.50.

coverage.key_assumptions: Upgraded to Outperform following failed CoreWeave merger; sees major upside.
coverage.note: Macquarie upgraded CORZ to Outperform after CRWV deal collapse.

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP: BTC holdings + mining EBITDA + AI co-lo + $3M/MW for AI-earmarked power; miners trade ~90% discount to general DC valuations
coverage.note: Bernstein hikes CORZ from $17 to $24 on AI infrastructure SOTP framework.

coverage.key_assumptions: Methodology not explicitly disclosed in available sources; Roth has historically used SOTP/NPV for HPC conversion stories.
coverage.note: Roth Capital high target of $40 on CORZ.
Reaffirmed Buy on Digihost (DGHI, later renamed Digi Power X / DGXX in March 2025)
Reiterated Buy on DGXX (post-rebrand from Digihost)
Reiterated Buy with Q2 estimate update

coverage.key_assumptions: HPC initiative progress including $1.1B 40 MW AI campus deal
coverage.note: Raised PT from $2.50 to $5.00 on HPC progress
Described as 'A Misunderstood Crypto Stock Poised For A Breakout'. Cloud mining powering growth with strategic Bitmain partnerships.

coverage.key_assumptions: Growth uncertainty without clear power acquisition visibility.

coverage.note: Maintained Buy; lowered PT from $6 to $5
Maintained Buy; lowered PT from $5 to $4
Upgrade to Buy from Neutral, PT raised to $5.

coverage.key_assumptions: Roth uses SOTP/NPV framework typically; PT raised from $6 to $7.50 (+25%).
coverage.note: Roth Capital raised HIVE PT 25% maintaining Buy.

coverage.key_assumptions: 5x EV/revenue multiple applied to revised CY2026 revenue estimate of $498.7M.
coverage.note: PT raised to $10 from $8 on 5x EV/revenue multiple.

coverage.key_assumptions: Methodology not explicitly disclosed in summary.

coverage.note: Downgrade to Market Perform, PT cut to $3.50 from $11.
Large BTC treasury per share makes HUT an attractive Bitcoin proxy

coverage.key_assumptions: Pre-Fluidstack deal PT raised from $32 to $36; methodology not explicitly disclosed in summary.
River Bend valued at $22/sh up from $14/sh based on Fluidstack contract terms

coverage.note: Raised after $7B Fluidstack/Google-backed lease at River Bend; PUE 1.35; $6.9B 15yr NOI

coverage.key_assumptions: Preliminary DCF model on River Bend project incorporating Fluidstack pricing and 15-yr terms; River Bend valued at $22/share (up from $14).
coverage.note: Canaccord uses explicit DCF on River Bend HPC site as primary value driver.

coverage.key_assumptions: DCF framework continued; PT raised from $62 to $70 reflecting updated River Bend economics.
coverage.note: Canaccord raised HUT to $70 maintaining DCF approach for HPC site valuation.
AI/HPC expansion adds second growth driver alongside mining

coverage.key_assumptions: Downgraded to Neutral from Overweight on valuation; PT raised from $12 to $16. Same 4-yr gross profit + land/power + HODL framework.
coverage.note: JPMorgan downgraded IREN on valuation despite raising PT.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $20 to $33 (+65%); methodology not explicitly stated.
coverage.note: Macquarie raised IREN PT 65% on AI/HPC momentum.

coverage.key_assumptions: 12x multiple on $1.124B FY27 AI Cloud revenue ($13.488B = $49.60/sh); 10x annualized cash profit on mining at $116K BTC and $50K all-in cost = $18/sh; Sweetwater Phase 1 = $32.17/sh.
coverage.note: Textbook SOTP with three explicit segments; PT doubled from $49 to $100.

coverage.key_assumptions: Roth historically uses SOTP/NPV on HPC conversions; specific multiples not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Roth set $82 PT on IREN after AI pivot.
PT raise after $9.7B Microsoft AI cloud deal; Wall Street's biggest IREN bull

coverage.key_assumptions: AI cloud business at 14x 2027 EBITDA contributes ~$28.5B of $41B total EV; 87% AI cloud/colo + 13% mining mix.
coverage.note: Bernstein SOTP heavily weighted to AI cloud segment after Microsoft deal.
PT trimmed from $142 due to weaker mining revenues
Cantor's Knoblauch said IREN could hit $384 by 2028

coverage.key_assumptions: Three-year SOTP framework projects IREN could reach $384 by 2028 on Microsoft AI cloud deal; intermediate $136 12-mo target. Same AI cloud multiple + mining + Sweetwater structure.
coverage.note: Cantor raised IREN to $136 after Microsoft $9.7B deal; long-run case $384 by 2028.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $50 to $105 citing execution, secured power depth, and hyperscaler AI capex >$600B in 2026; specific multiples not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Compass Point reiterated Buy; methodology framework hinted but not fully disclosed.
Maintains Overweight; PT cut to $61 from $82
Upgraded from Neutral; improved hash rate and BTC price outlook
Maintaining Buy despite Q3 miss on net income due to BTC fair value marks
Positive on MARA's hash rate growth trajectory and BTC treasury strategy

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $21 to $33 mid-2025 on increased revenue and bitcoin production; Knoblauch noted MARA's pivot to owning/operating mining infrastructure to reduce all-in cost. Methodology not explicitly disclosed in available sources.
coverage.note: Cantor Fitzgerald maintained Overweight on MARA with $33 PT in mid-2025; later cut to $30, then $21, then $11, then $10 through 2026 on bitcoin price weakness.

coverage.key_assumptions: Four-year gross profit opportunity framework expanded to include value of land/power assets and a HODL premium for BTC on balance sheet (MicroStrategy-like).
coverage.note: JPMorgan upgraded MARA to Overweight with $22 PT, citing infrastructure exposure and improved mining economics.

coverage.key_assumptions: MARA viewed as the most-scaled shop for broad exposure to Bitcoin infrastructure; methodology not explicitly stated.
coverage.note: Macquarie initiated MARA at Outperform with $22 PT.

coverage.key_assumptions: Historically uses low-to-mid double-digit EV/EBITDA multiples for digital asset miners; PT raised from $21 to $23 with Neutral rating maintained.
coverage.note: B. Riley raised MARA PT modestly while maintaining Neutral.
Cantor raises PT to $30 on Bitcoin holdings.
PT lowered to $21 from $30 on weaker BTC.
Upgraded Neutral to Buy with $30 PT.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT cut from $20 to $13 on falling BTC and rising hashrate; same 4-yr gross profit + HODL premium + power asset value framework.
coverage.note: JPMorgan trimmed MARA target on bitcoin price decline.
PT lowered to $11 from $21, Overweight maintained.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT cut from $21 to $11 reflecting weaker BTC prices and mining profitability; mining revenue down ~20% QoQ, adjusted EBITDA turned negative.
coverage.note: Cantor Fitzgerald maintained Overweight rating on MARA but cut PT on weaker bitcoin and mining margin compression.

coverage.key_assumptions: 8x multiple on reduced 2027E EBITDA estimate of $99M (cut from $571M) implying ~$2/share for mining; $7/share assigned to HPC partnership.
coverage.note: Sum-of-the-parts framework valuing mining and HPC operations separately; revised target to $9 after EBITDA estimate cut.
Cantor lowers PT to $10 on weaker BTC.
Maintains Buy, raised PT to $15 from $11.

coverage.key_assumptions: Q2 EPS forecast cut to ($0.69) from ($0.57)

coverage.note: Downgraded from Buy; SEC subpoena adds uncertainty; regulatory risk elevated
Overweight; largest fully owned US mining campus provides strategic advantage
Buy; Riot's Corsicana facility expansion is key catalyst; demand response is a competitive moat

coverage.key_assumptions: Bullish on BTC adoption inflection; methodology not explicitly disclosed.
coverage.note: Stifel maintains Buy with $18 PT on RIOT.

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP applies NPV to RIOT converting ~1.7GW portfolio to HPC
coverage.note: Roth raises RIOT PT to $42 from $17.50 on SOTP/NPV of HPC conversion.

coverage.key_assumptions: Four-year gross profit framework + land/power asset value + HODL premium; double-upgrade with Citi following AI pivot.
coverage.note: JPMorgan boosted RIOT to Overweight from Neutral, PT to $19 from $15.
Cantor raises RIOT PT to $26 on Bitcoin sales.

coverage.key_assumptions: Sum-of-the-parts analysis applying NPV estimate to converting RIOT's ~1.7GW portfolio to high-performance computing (HPC). PT raised from $17.50 to $42 (+140%).
coverage.note: Roth Capital used SOTP/NPV for HPC conversion of Corsicana power; later cut PT to $38.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $16 to $28 reiterating Buy; B. Riley historically uses low/mid-double-digit EV/EBITDA multiples for miners.
coverage.note: B. Riley raised RIOT to $28 alongside CORZ upgrade.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $22 to $30; methodology not explicitly stated in available sources.
coverage.note: Macquarie raised RIOT target to $30 reflecting AI/HPC pivot momentum.

coverage.key_assumptions: Bernstein switched from DCF to SOTP: BTC holdings + mining EBITDA + AI co-lo + $3M/MW for AI-earmarked power capacity
coverage.note: Bernstein hikes RIOT PT from $19 to $25 in SOTP framework focused on power asset value.

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP/NPV methodology continued; PT trimmed from $42 to $38 ahead of formal Corsicana lease in H2 2026.
coverage.note: Roth maintained Buy and SOTP framework but trimmed target.

coverage.key_assumptions: Corsicana valued $53/sh (up from $47); higher probability AMD exercises options on 150MW IT load
coverage.note: Cantor raises PT to $23 after Q1 FY26 first DC revenue ($33.2M) and AMD delivery.

coverage.key_assumptions: AMD expansion
First-mover advantage in AI computing, revenue growth, data center infrastructure + clean energy positioning
coverage.note: Approximate date - retail-focused brokerage initiation; only sell-side coverage found for SAIH

coverage.key_assumptions: Project Dorothy 1A/1B operationalized, Project Dorothy 2 energizing, 64% hosting capacity expansion to 48 MW; 80% revenue growth to $38M FY24
coverage.note: Upgrade Neutral->Buy; HCW also acted as placement agent on $32M direct offering
Nuclear-powered mining gives WULF structural cost advantage; strong margin improvement

coverage.key_assumptions: SOTP across HPC colo agreements with Core42 + Fluidstack/Google plus Lake Mariner & Cayuga expansion
PT raised to $23; methodology not disclosed.
Roth historically uses SOTP/NPV for HPC conversions; specific WULF multiples not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Roth/MKM reiterated Buy on WULF with $26 PT.
Raised on AI data center pipeline expansion

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised on HPC growth; methodology not disclosed in summary.
coverage.note: Compass Point raised WULF target on HPC growth.

coverage.key_assumptions: PT raised from $24 to $30 on AI expansion; HPC margins ~77%, 522MW funded contracted capacity by end-2026. Methodology framework not explicitly labeled.
coverage.note: Cantor raised WULF on AI/HPC trajectory; likely sum-of-segments but not explicitly labeled SOTP.
